recommended_actions.action: Manual review recommended before trusting this APK.
recommended_actions.rationale: Medium is a review-needed state, not a confirmed malware verdict.
Hardcoded credentials or API keys were detected.
Domains/IPs were found statically or dynamically.

recommended_actions.action: Use MITRE mapping to guide analyst workflow.
recommended_actions.rationale: Mapped tactics provide a structured review path.

mitre_attack_mapping.recommended_action: Review why the app starts after boot.
Run in multiple sandboxes and inspect anti-analysis checks.
Review contacted domains/IPs and block suspicious infrastructure.
Rotate exposed keys and verify if secrets are production credentials.

network_analysis.note: Network analysis combines static strings with emulator artifacts. It is triage evidence, not proof of live C2 behavior.

actions_taken.message: APK would be copied to local quarantine.
